title: Add Two Numbers (Linked List)
pattern: Linked List â€” Digit-wise Simulation with Carry
coreIdea: Add two numbers represented as linked lists (digits stored in reverse order) by simulating elementary addition digit by digit, tracking a carry that propagates to the next position.
recognitionCues: numbers represented as linked lists of digits, typically reversed order
asks to return the sum as a new linked list
approach: Traverse both lists simultaneously, summing corresponding digits plus carry from the previous step. Create a new node with sum % 10, update carry = sum / 10. Continue until both lists and carry are exhausted, handling lists of different lengths.
